name: The Infographics Show
oneLine: Animated explainer channel that tackles history, true crime, hypotheticals, and science with colorful 2D motion graphics.
bio: The Infographics Show is a faceless studio-run YouTube channel that publishes near-daily animated videos in a recognizable flat 2D style produced in Adobe Illustrator and After Effects. Topics span true crime, military history, survival hypotheticals, comparison videos, and pop science. As of late 2024 the channel had roughly 14.7 million subscribers and over 6 billion total views, and operates spinoff channels including Fact Fiend and similar formats.
style: narrated 2D motion-graphics infographic videos with character cutouts, near-daily upload cadence
